mapper.sql: provider_id, name, base_url, enabled, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from internal_model_providers order by sort_order, provider_id
select from internal_model_providers where enabled = true order by sort_order, provider_id
mapper.update: update internal_model_providers set name = #{name}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where provider_id = #{providerId}
mapper.select: select setting_id, icbc_openai_auth_token, created_at, updated_at from internal_model_proxy_settings where setting_id = 'default'
mapper.update: update internal_model_proxy_settings set icbc_openai_auth_token = #{authToken}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where setting_id = 'default'
